texto: Midnight"The hours glide Like drops of water on a window pane Midnight silence Fear unrolls in the air And the wind hides at the bottom of the well OH It's a leaf We think the earth is going to end Time stirs in the shadow Everyone is asleep A SIGH Inside the house someone has just died
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Vicente Huidobro: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Midnight"The hours glide Like drops of water on a window pane Midnight silence Fear unrolls in th…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, darkness, death pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao-noturna e boa-noite.

texto: New Song"For You, ManuelitaInside the HorizonSOMEONE WAS SINGING The voice Is not known WHERE DOES IT COME FROM Among the branches No one is to be seen The moon itself was an ear And one hears no sound However a star unnailed Has fallen into the pond THE HORIZON HAS CLOSED UP And there is no exit
